top_signals.title: Copper Jumps to Two-Week High After US-Iran Truce Deal Report
top_signals.summary: Copper jumped to a two-week high on speculation that the US and Iran are nearing a diplomatic resolution to the Middle East conflict that has shaken global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chevron CEO Wirth warns oil prices likely to rise as Iran war hits supplies
top_signals.summary: Blockade in Strait of Hormuz has removed up to 13mn barrels a day from global markets and drawn down ‘shock absorbers’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin grows over 500% in a month, but still lags main rivals
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New '60 Minutes' head Nick Bilton says Paramount hired him to pivot the show before ratings decline
top_signals.summary: Nick Bilton is a former New York Times columnist and has made several documentaries for Netflix, where he worked with CBS News editor-in-chief Bari Weiss.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
